text_fr: Protection des personnes detenues ou emprisonnees  du  fait  de  leur  lutte  contre l'apattheid, le racisme  et  la  discrimination raciale, le colonialisme, l'agre~ion et l'occupation  etrangere  et  pour  l'autodeter› mination,  l 'independance  et  le  progres  social de  leur  peuple
text_en: Protection of persons detained or imprisoned as a result of their struggle against apattheid, racism and racial discrimination, colonialism, aggression and foreign occupation and for self-determination, independence and social progress of their people

text_fr: L 'Assemblee generale,
text_en: The General Assembly,

text_fr: Rappe/ant ses resolutions 3246 (XXIX) du 29  novembre 1974, 3382 (XXX) du  10  novembre 1975, 31/34  du  30  novembre  1976  et  32/14  du  7 novembre 1977, dans lesquelles elle a reaffirme la  legitimite de la Jutte  des  peoples  pour la  liberation  de  la  domination coloniale  et  etrangere  par  tous  les  moyens  en  leur pouvoir,  y compris la Jutte armee, et exige le  respect total des droits individuels fondamentaux de toutes Jes personnes  detenues  ou emprisonnees  du  fait  de  leur Jutte  pour  l'autodetermination et  l'independance, et leur liberation immediate,
text_en: Rappe/ant ses resolutions 3246 (XXIX) of 29 November 1974, 3382 (XXX) of 10 November 1975, 31/34 of 30 November 1976 and 32/14 of 7 November 1977, in which it reaffirmed the legitimacy of the Jutte des peuples pour la libération de la domination coloniale et étranger by all means in their power, including the Jutte armée, and demanded full respect for the fundamental individual rights of all persons detained or imprisoned by virtue of their Jutte for self-determination and independence, and their immediate release,

text_fr: Notant  avec sati!>faction Jes  progres  realises  vers !'elimination du  colonialisme et la  realisation du  droit des  peoples a l'autodetermination,
text_en: Noting with sati!>Is progress made towards the elimination of colonialism and the realization of the right of the people to self-determination,

text_fr: Exprimant sa profonde preoccupation devant le  deni persistant du droit a l'autodetermination des peoples de la  Namibie,  du  Zimbabwe  et  de  la  Palestine  et  des autres  peoples  qui  luttent  pour la  realisation  de  leur droit a l'autodetermination et leur liberation du  colo› nialisme et du racisme,
text_en: Expressing its deep concern at the continuing denial of the right to self-determination of the people of Namibia, Zimbabwe and Palestine and other people who are struggling for the realization of their right to self-determination and their freedom from coloism and racism,

text_fr: Rappe/ant que  le Conseil  de  securite,  dans  sa resolution 392 (1976)  du  I 9 juin  I 976,  a  condamne vi› goureusement a nouveau  la  politique d'apartheid comme constituant un crime contre la  conscience et la dignite de l'humanite et comme troublant gravement la paix  et  la  securite  internationales  et  souligne  la legitimite  de  la  Jutte  du peuple  sud-africain  pour I'elimination  de l'apartheid et  de  la  discrimination raciale,
text_en: Regrets that the Security Council, in its Resolution 392 (1976) of 9 June I 976, re-declared the policy of apartheid as a crime against the conscience and dignity of humanity and as a serious disturbance to international peace and security, and stresses the legitimacy of the Jutte of the South African people for the elimination of apartheid and racial discrimination,

text_fr: Soulignant la  necessite  du  respect  des  droits  de I' homme et des libertes fondamentales pour tous, sans distinction de race, de sexe, de langue ou de religion,
text_en: Emphasizing the need for respect for human rights and fundamental freedoms for all without distinction as to race, sex, language or religion,

text_fr: Rappe/ant sa  resolution  3103  (XXVIII)  du  12  de› cembre  1973,  dans  laquelle  elle  a  proclame  solen› nellement  Jes  principes  de  base  concernant  le  statut juridique des combattants qui luttent contre la domina› tion coloniale et etrangere et les  regimes  racistes,
text_en: Repealing its resolution 3103 (XXVIII) of 12 December 1973, in which it solemnly proclaimed my basic principles concerning the legal status of combatants fighting against colonial and foreign domination and racist regimes,

items_fr: 1. Exprime sa solidarite  avec  les  combattants qui luttent pour l'independance nationale et le  progres so› cial  de leur peuple, contre le  colonialisme, I'apartheid, le  racisme et !'occupation etrangere:

2. Sou/igne a nouveau que  toutes  tentatives  de repression de la lutte contre la  domination coloniale et les regimes racistes sont incompatibles avec la Charte des  Nations  Unies  et  la  Declaration  universelle  des droits de  l'homme:

3. Exige la liberation  de toutes  Jes personnes detenues ou emprisonnees du  fait  de leur lutte contre !'apartheid, le  racisme et la  discrimination  raciale,  le colonialisme,  l'agression et I' occupation etrangere et pour l'autodetermination, l'independance et le  progres social de  leur peuple;
4. Insiste pour qu'lsrael et les  regimes minoritaires racistes d 'Afrique australe liberent  immediatement et inconditionnellement toutes Jes  personnes detenues ou
items_en: 1. Expresses its solidarity with the combatants fighting for national independence and the social progress of their people, against colonialism, apartheid, racism and foreign occupation:

2. Sou/igne a nouveau that any attempts to repress the struggle against colonial domination and racist regimes are incompatible with the Charter of the United Nations and the Universal Declaration of Human Rights:

3. Demands the release of all persons detained or imprisoned as a result of their struggle against apartheid, racism and racial discrimination, colonialism, aggression and foreign occupation and for the self-determination, independence and social progress of their people;
4. Insists that Israel and the racist minority regimes in southern Africa immediately and unconditionally release all persons detained or

text_fr: emprisonnees  parce  qu'elles  luttent  pour  l'auto› determination  et  l'independance  nationale  et  con› tre !'apartheid, le  racisme et la  discrimination  raciale sous toutes leurs formes,  le  colonialisme et !'occupa› tion etrangere;
text_en: Imprisoned because they struggle for self-determination and national independence and respect for apartheid, racism and racial discrimination in all their forms, colonialism and foreign occupation;

items_fr: 5. Fait appel aux Etats Membres pour qu'ils four› nissent un  soutien et  une aide dans tous Jes  domaines aux peoples qui luttent pour se liberer du colonialisme, de !'occupation etrangere, du  racisme et de la discrimi› nation  raciale:

6. Prie la  Commission  des  droits  de  l'homme de continuer a accorder  une  attention  particuliere a la question  de  la  liberation  des  personnes  detenues  ou emprisonnees  du  fait  de  leur  participation a la  lutte contre l'apartheid, le racisme  et  la  discrimination raciale,  le  colonialisme,  l'agression  et  l'occupation etrangere et pour l'autodetermination, l'independance et le  progres social  de  leur peuple:

7. Prie la  Commission des  droits  de  l'homme de presenter, par l'intermediaire du  Conseil  economique et  social,  un  rapport  sur l'application de  la  presente resolution a I' Assemblee  generale  lors  de  sa  trente› troisieme session.
items_en: 5. Appeals to the Member States to provide support and assistance in all areas to the people who are struggling to free themselves from colonialism, foreign occupation, racism and racial discrimination:

6. Requests the Commission on Human Rights to continue to pay particular attention to the issue of the release of persons detained or imprisoned as a result of their participation in the fight against apartheid, racism and racial discrimination, colonialism, aggression and foreign occupation and for the self-determination, independence and social progress of their people:

7. Requests the Commission on Human Rights to submit, through the intermediary of the Economic and Social Council, a report on the implementation of the present resolution to the General Assembly at its thirty-third session.

text_fr: 32/ 123. Celebration  du  trentieme  anniversaire  de  la Declaration universelle des  droits de  l'homme
text_en: 32/ 123. Commemoration of the third anniversary of the Universal Declaration of Human Rights

text_fr: L 'Assemh/ee generate,
text_en: Assemh/ee generate,

text_fr: Considerant que l'annee 1978 marquera le  trentieme anniversaire de  la Declaration universelle des droits de l'homme 56 qui, corn,:ue  "'comme !'ideal commun a at› teindre par tous les peoples et toutes les nations'·, a ete et continue ajuste titre d'etre une source fondamentale d'inspiration  pour  les  efforts  nationaux  et  inter› nationaux visant a proteger et a promouvoir les droits de  l'homme et les  lihertes fondamentales,
text_en: Recognizing that the year 1978 will mark the very anniversary of the Universal Declaration of Human Rights, 56 which, as it has been, has been and continues to be a fundamental source of inspiration for national and inter-national efforts to protect and promote human rights and fundamental liherts,

text_fr: Consciente du fait que,  pour  etre  pleinement respectes, les droits de  I' homme doivent etre garantis a tous les etres humains et que cet objectif ne  peut etre atteint que si  les  droits de  l'homme sont portes a  leur connaissance, notamment par  l'enseignement  et !'education,
text_en: Aware of the fact that, in order to be fully respected, human rights must be guaranteed to all human beings and that this objective can only be achieved if human rights are brought to their knowledge, in particular through education and education,

text_fr: Rappe/ant, a  cet  egard,  sa  resolution  217  (III)  du 10  decembre  1948,  proclamant la  Declaration, qui  de› mande que ·"tousles individus et tousles organes de la societe,  ayant  cette Declaration  constamment  a !'esprit, s'efforcent, par l'enseignement et l'education, de  developper le  respect de  ces droits et libertes",
text_en: In this regard, its Resolution 217 (III) of 10 December 1948, proclaiming the Declaration, which calls for "all individuals and bodies of society, having this Declaration constantly in mind, to strive, through teaching and education, to develop respect for these rights and freedoms",

text_fr: Rappe/ant egalement sa resolution 2906 (XXVII) du 19  octobre  1972.  relative  a  la  celebration  du  vingt› cinquieme anniversaire de  la  Declaration,
text_en: Recalling also its resolution 2906 (XXVII) of 19 October 1972 on the celebration of the twenty-fifth anniversary of the Declaration,

text_fr: Considerant la  resolution 3 (XXXIII) de la Commis› sion  des  droits  de  l'homme. en  date  du  21  fevrier 1977 57 , approuvee par le  Conseil economique et social a  sa soixante-deuxieme session, qui  recommande aux Etats Membres, aux institutions specialisees et a toutes les  organisations intemationales, gouvernementales et
text_en: On 21 February 1977, 57 , approved by the Economic and Social Council at its sixty-second session, which recommends to the Member States, to the specialized institutions and to all international, governmental and non-governmental organizations, to the Commission on Human Rights at its sixty-second session.

text_fr: ;non gouvemementales, concemees par la protection et la  promotion  des  droits  de  l'homme de  prendre  des mesures appropriees pour que le trentieme anniversaire de la Declaration soit !'occasion d'efforts particuliers pour promouvoir la comprehension, la cooperation et la paix  intemationales, ainsi  que  le  respect  universe!  et effectif des droits de l'homme, plus particulierement en insistant  sur l'approche educative, aussi  bien  dans  le cadre des  systemes scolaires formels  qu'a l'exterieur de celui-ci,
text_en: (a) non-governmental organisations, concerned with the protection and promotion of human rights, to take appropriate measures to ensure that the very anniversary of the Declaration is an occasion for special efforts to promote understanding, cooperation and international peace, as well as universal respect for and effectiveness of human rights, in particular by emphasizing the educational approach, both within formal and external school systems;

text_fr: Desireuse de donner une signification appropriee au trentieme anniversaire de la  Declaration.
text_en: Desirous of giving appropriate meaning to the very anniversary of the Declaration.

text_fr: Prenant note avec sati:..faction des suggestions con› tenues  dans  la  note  du  Secretaire  general  sur  la celebration  du  trentieme  anniversaire  de la De› claration58,
text_en: Taking note with sati:..faction of the con› suggestions contained in the note of the Secretary General on the celebration of the very anniversary of the De› claration58,

items_fr: 1. Invite Jes Etats  Membres,  Jes institutions specialisees,  Jes  organisations intergouvernementales regionales et Jes organisations non gouvemementales a prendre des mesures appropriees, telles que celles qui figurent a !'annexe a la presente resolution, pour cele› brer le  trentieme  anniversaire  de  la  Declaration  uni› verselle des droits de  l'homme:

2. Prie le Secretaire  general  d'entreprendre,  it !'echelon de  !'Organisation des  Nations  Unies.  des activites  appropriees,  telles  que  celles  qui sont indiquees dans !'annexe a la presente resolution, pour celebrer le  trentieme anniversaire de  la  Declaration;

3. Se felicite de la decision prise par l'Organisation des  Nations  Unies  pour !'education, la  science et la culture d' organiser  en  I 978  une  conference  inter› nationale sur l'enseignement des droits de l'homme et, dans ce contexte, fait appel a tousles Etats pour qu'ils facilitent  la  participation  d'experts qualifies a cette conference;

4. Invite !'Organisation des  Nations  Unies  pour !'education, la science et la culture a  prendre Jes  me› sures appropriees  pour consulter la Commission des droits de l'homme, a sa trente-quatrieme session, sur !'elaboration  d'un  programme  d'action  destine  a developper  l'enseignement  des  droits  de  l'homme, conformement a la  resolution 3 (XXXIII)  de  la  Com› mission;

5. Decide d'inscrire a I' ordre du jour provisoire de sa  trente-troisieme  session  une  question  intitulee "Trentieme anniversaire de la Declaration universelle des  droits  de  l'homme :  cooperation  internationale pour la promotion et le  respect des droits civils, politi› ques,  economiques,  sociaux  et  culturels"  et  recom› mande  que  cette  question  soit  examinee  en  seance pleniere;

6. Decide en outre de tenir une seance commemo› rative speciale pour celebrer, le  10  decembre 1978,  le trentieme  anniversaire  de  la  Declaration  et  prie  le Secretaire general de  prendre Jes  mesures necessaires pour pre parer le  programme de  cette seance.
items_en: 1. Invites my Member States, my specialized institutions, my regional intergovernmental organizations and my non-governmental organizations to take appropriate measures, such as those contained in the annex to the present resolution, to mark the very anniversary of the United Declaration of Human Rights:
2. Requests the Secretary General to undertake appropriate activities, such as those indicated in the annex to the present resolution, to celebrate the very anniversary of the Declaration;

3. Welcomes the decision taken by the United Nations on education, science and culture to hold an inter-national conference on human rights education in I 978 and, in this context, calls upon all States to facilitate the participation of qualified experts in this conference;

4. Invites the United Nations Educational, Scientific and Cultural Organization to take the appropriate steps to consult the Commission on Human Rights at its thirty-fourth session on the development of a programme of action to develop human rights education, in accordance with Commission resolution 3 (XXXIII);

5. Decides to include in the provisional agenda of its thirty-third session an item entitled "Thirty-year anniversary of the Universal Declaration of Human Rights: international cooperation for the promotion and respect of civil, political, economic, social and cultural rights" and recommends that this matter be considered in plenary session;

6. Also decides to hold a special commemorative session to celebrate, on 10 December 1978, the very anniversary of the Declaration and requests the Secretary General to take the necessary measures to prepare the programme of this session.

items_en: 1, The following measures are suggested as possible activities for the national echelon:
(a) To formally proclaim on 10 December 1978 the Human Rights Act:
On 10 December 1978, to publish special messages issued by Heads of State or Government or other eminent civilian persons:
(i) To hold special meetings in parliaments and other public or private institutions on the occasion of the Human Rights Treaty;

(d) In the case of States which have not yet ratified or acceded to the international human rights instruments of the United Nations. give special attention to the possibility of becoming parties to the Convention:
(e) Establish national or local institutions for the promotion and protection of human rights:
(f) Encourage educational programmes on human rights at different levels of education:
(g) Publish the Universal Declaration of Human Rights in my national languages, including the languages of the minorities:
Ii) Issue first-day stamps and envelopes and provide special obliterations on the human rights theme in 1978:
(i) Engage non-governmental organizations in events and organize activities for them:
(j) Organize activities within the framework and support for current and international decades in preparation on human rights issues.
"It is recommended that I take the following steps.
(a) Organization of commemorative meetings at the United Nations Headquarters and the United Nations Office;1 Geneva, 10 December 1978 or about that date:

Organization in Geneva, in 1978. of a special seminar of world character, within the framework of the programme of advisory services. on the theme of national and local institutions for the promotion and protection of human rights. the report of which would be transmitted to the General Assembly:
(c) Adoption of provisions to set 11 prices for the cause of human rights as envisaged in recommendation C of Annex it General Assembly Resolution No. 17 ( XXI) of 19 December 1%6:

(d) Dissemination by the Information Service of the Secretariat of the appropriate information and broadcasting equipment and audio-visual equipment, in order to highlight and emphasize the importance of the Universal Declaration of Human Rights as well as the work done by the United Nations to ensure the effective enjoyment of human rights and fundamental freedoms:
